executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Two external owner-loop incidents at critical escalation: marketing-workflow-audit (116 consecutive context-overflow errors) and blocked-channel-recovery (380 consecutive timeouts). Architecture-owned gates are green but whole-stack certification blocked by these external loops.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Resolve the marketing-workflow-audit context-overflow spiral and blocked-channel-recovery timeout spiral. These are the active critical escalations.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: openclaw cron list --json plus direct artifact cross-checks

findings.title: marketing-workflow-audit: 116 consecutive context-overflow errors, escalation critical
findings.mechanism: The job hits model context overflow on every run. This is a structural defect — the prompt accumulated by the marketing workflow audit loop exceeds model context limits.
findings.root_cause: Prompt bloat or session accumulation in the marketing-workflow-audit cron job exceeds model capacity.
findings.recommended_fix: Reset the marketing-workflow-audit session (context) or restructure the prompt to fit within model limits. Consider splitting into smaller audit steps.

findings.title: blocked-channel-recovery: 380 consecutive timeouts, escalation critical
findings.mechanism: Every execution attempt times out. Likely a hanging script or unrecoverable network dependency.
findings.root_cause: Timeout loop — job exceeds its 3600s timeout on every run without producing output.
findings.recommended_fix: Stop the job, diagnose the hanging condition (network I/O, infinite loop, blocked external API), fix, and restart.

findings.title: Marketing independent verification artifact stale (>2484 min) with verdict fail
findings.mechanism: Last marketing independent verification ran on 2026-05-28 and returned fail. The artifact is far beyond its 240-min freshness window.
findings.root_cause: Marketing owner loop cannot produce a passing independent verification because primary-repo adoption metrics are not measurable.
findings.recommended_fix: Fix the two critical escalations (marketing-workflow-audit, blocked-channel-recovery) first, then re-run marketing independent verification.

findings.title: Architecture verifier fails closed on stale independent-verification artifact
findings.mechanism: The architecture independent verification artifact was produced before the latest agent_architecture_latest.json refresh, so the verifier correctly fails closed.
findings.root_cause: Verifier enforces artifact freshness; the last architecture independent verification artifact (12:34) predates the current audit refresh (12:35).
findings.recommended_fix: Rerun architecture independent verification after this audit artifact write.

findings.title: Live Gateway cron topology is clean: 23 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, 0 last-error
findings.mechanism: Direct openclaw cron list --json confirms a clean live topology snapshot at audit time.
findings.root_cause: No runtime topology issues. The snapshot shows no running or errored jobs at this moment (they may have completed or not yet fired).
findings.recommended_fix: Keep direct cron inspection as source of truth on each watchdog run.

findings.title: Loop integrity: both ralph-docs-watchdog and agent-architecture-watchdog are ok
findings.mechanism: Loop integrity check confirms both watchdog loops are healthy with no repairs or errors pending.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-owned watchdog loops are functioning correctly.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Stop and reset the marketing-workflow-audit context-overflow spiral (116 consecutive failures, critical escalation)
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Every run burns resources and fails. The prompt needs structural repair — likely a session reset or prompt decomposition.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Restores the marketing-workflow-audit to functional state, unblocks marketing independent verification.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Stop and diagnose the blocked-channel-recovery timeout spiral (380 consecutive failures, critical escalation)
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: 380 consecutive timeouts with no progress. The job is hanging on every run.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Identifies root cause (hung script, blocked API, infinite loop) and restores recovery capability.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Re-run marketing independent verification after the two critical escalations are resolved
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: The stale 2026-05-28 fail-closed artifact is the gate blocking whole-stack certification.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed state.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Rerun architecture independent verification after this audit write completes
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Verifier properly fails closed on stale artifact — need fresh verification to clear architecture gates.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Architecture gates go green (architecture-owned layers are already coherent).

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Direct openclaw cron list --json: 23 total, 23 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, 0 last-error. Cleaner snapshot than previous report (which had 12 running + 1 errored — those jobs likely completed between snapshots).

Identified the two active critical escalations as the primary whole-stack blockers: marketing-workflow-audit (116 context-overflow errors) and blocked-channel-recovery (380 timeouts). Both are external to architecture-owned loops.
Reconfirmed both ralph-docs-watchdog and agent-architecture-watchdog report ok with no pending repairs/errors.

independent_verification.method: Direct openclaw cron list --json + health_monitor_latest.json cross-check + loop_integrity_latest.json verification + marketing_loop_independent_verification.json freshness check
independent_verification.summary: Independent verification performed live during this watchdog run. Architecture-owned layers (cron topology, loop integrity, watchdog health) are green. Whole-stack blocked by two critical external escalations: marketing-workflow-audit context-overflow (116 repeats) and blocked-channel-recovery timeout (380 repeats). Marketing independent verification artifact is 2484+ min stale with fail verdict.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh architecture independent verification artifact (verifier correctly fails closed because the last iv artifact predates this audit write)
Fresh marketing independent verification (requires fixing the two critical marketing escalations first)

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Two critical owner-loop escalations block whole-stack certification
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: marketing-workflow-audit fails on every run with context overflow (116 repeats, escalated). blocked-channel-recovery times out on every run (380 repeats, escalated). These are the active incidents preventing any marketing verification from passing.

notes: Architecture-owned gates are coherent and green. The whole-stack cannot be certified because two external owner loops are in critical failure spirals.
The live cron topology snapshot (23/23/0/0/0) is clean — no runtime topology issues exist.
Persisted disabled jobs remain history only; live disabled jobs are 0.
No repairs were applied to the two critical escalations during this watchdog run — those belong to the marketing and unblocker owner loops respectively.
Architecture verifier correctly fails closed because the independent verification artifact predates the current audit refresh.
